case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE, REINSTATE, AND EXONERATE BOND.
